title: Manifesto Against PEC 65/2023: An Open Letter on the Financial Autonomy of the Central Bank of Brazil
description: An open letter opposing Brazil's Proposed Constitutional Amendment No. 65 of 2023 (PEC 65/2023), which would grant the Central Bank of Brazil broad financial and budgetary autonomy while removing it from parliamentary and audit oversight.

creators.name: Dantas, Flavia
creators.affiliation: State University of New York at Cortland
